All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
APIException
 
ApiResponse
 
AuthController
REST controller for user authentication operations.
AuthService
Service responsible for all user authentication and registration business logic.
AuthServiceApplication
 
DataInitializer
Application startup component that seeds the roles table with default roles.
ErrorResponse
 
GlobalExceptionHandler
 
JwtUtil
Utility component for JWT token generation, parsing, and validation.
LoginRequestDTO
 
Role
JPA entity representing a user role in the system.
RoleRepository
 
SecurityConfig
Spring Security configuration for the Auth Service.
SignupRequestDTO
 
SwaggerConfig
 
User
JPA entity representing a registered user in the system.
UserDetailsImpl
Spring Security principal object wrapping an authenticated User entity.
UserDetailsServiceImpl
Spring Security UserDetailsService implementation for the Auth Service.
UserInfoResponse
 
UserRepository
